steps.title: Use the reach clue
steps.content: The organization gives the artist broader reach because photography editors around the world can search the website and find Indigenous photographer members. The blank must mean publicize or make work more visible.

steps.title: Reject wrong actions
steps.content: Choice A is nonsensical with her work more broadly. Choice C means change the work, but the passage is about visibility. Choice D means find for the first time, which does not fit the artist's own work. The answer is B.
